name: canada-tax-rates
title: Canadian freelancer tax rates & thresholds (verified open dataset)
disclaimer: Estimates only, for planning purposes — not tax, legal, or accounting advice. Figures follow CRA-published 2026 rates; your actual return may differ. Confirm with the CRA or a qualified professional before filing.

files.description: Canada 2025: federal + Ontario brackets/BPA/surtax/health premium, CPP incl. CPP2, GST/HST core figures — as encoded in the tested engine
Canada 2026: federal + Ontario brackets/BPA/surtax/health premium, CPP incl. CPP2, GST/HST core figures — as encoded in the tested engine
Provincial brackets + BPA, 2025 and 2026: BC AB MB SK NS NB, plus Québec (QPP/QPIP/abatement) — as encoded in the tested engine
GST/HST registration thresholds and Quick Method rate grids (services + goods), platform rules, export cites — as encoded in the tested engine
CRA tax instalment thresholds and due dates — as encoded in the tested engine
Canadian tax deadlines (statutory dates; apply next-business-day rule) — as encoded in the tested engine
